name: @shupeixuan/micro-panel-hub
description: Embeddable React micro frontend workspace shell built with qiankun and flexlayout-react.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:site && pnpm run build:lib
scripts.build:site: pnpm --filter sub-app-demo build && pnpm --filter main-app build
scripts.build:lib: pnpm exec tsup --config tsup.config.ts && mkdir -p lib && cp main-app/src/index.css lib/styles.css && cp node_modules/flexlayout-react/style/light.css lib/flexlayout-light.css
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter main-app lint && pnpm --filter sub-app-demo lint
